changes: Removed duplicate tab title h3 — summary is now visible on desktop (no longer md:!hidden), desktop-only h3 removed
Moved background/rounded/padding from .tabs-panels to each details element. Added inner div wrapper (tabs-item-inner) for sticky positioning.
Removed JS color class toggling on .tabs-panels — each details element now manages its own color
focusAreas: Summary visibility on desktop with correct styling
Inner div wrapper exists with sticky positioning
Panels container no longer has background/padding classes
JS no longer toggles color classes on panels container
Per-tab colors still work via color class on details element
TSX/PHP sync for all structural changes
All 9 test page variations render correctly

build.notes: Build completed successfully. No new errors introduced by architectural changes.

colorClassesRemoved.verification: Lines 51-87 in Tabs.js: selectTab function no longer contains color class toggling code. Previously had lines to remove/add color classes to panelsContainer — now completely removed.
colorClassesRemoved.oldBehavior: JS read data-tab-color from buttons, removed all color classes from panelsContainer, then added active tab's color class
colorClassesRemoved.newBehavior: JS does not touch color classes at all. Color classes are statically applied to each details element via PHP/TSX.

colorClassOnDetails.tsx: TabsItem.tsx line 101: Color class applied to details element via cn() with tabColor from attributes
colorClassOnDetails.verification: Color classes are applied to each details element, not toggled by JS

passedChecks: Summary is visible on desktop with correct styling (md:mb-8 md:p-0, text-header-3 md:text-[2.5rem])
Plus/minus icon is hidden on desktop (md:hidden)
Duplicate desktop-only h3 removed from both TSX and PHP
Inner wrapper div (tabs-item-inner) exists with sticky positioning classes
Panels container (.tabs-panels) no longer has background/padding/rounded classes
Each details element has md:bg-accent-lighter md:rounded-3xl classes
JS no longer toggles color classes on panels container (code removed from selectTab function)
Per-tab colors still work via static color class on details element
TSX/PHP sync perfect - all structural changes match between editor and frontend
All 9 test page variations render correctly with new structure
ARIA attributes still correct after structural changes
Keyboard navigation, tab switching, and mode switching still work correctly

architecturalImprovements.before: Two h3 elements per tab: one in summary (md:!hidden on desktop) and one desktop-only h3
architecturalImprovements.after: Single h3 in summary visible on both mobile and desktop with responsive sizing
architecturalImprovements.benefit: Simpler DOM, less duplication, easier to maintain

architecturalImprovements.before: JS read color from data attributes and toggled color classes on panels container on tab switch
architecturalImprovements.after: Color classes statically applied to each details element via PHP/TSX, no JS involvement
architecturalImprovements.benefit: Less JavaScript logic, more predictable behavior, color styles apply immediately without JS

architecturalImprovements.before: Panels container had shared background/rounded/padding for all tabs
architecturalImprovements.after: Each details element manages its own background/rounded/padding
architecturalImprovements.benefit: Individual tabs are self-contained, easier to style per-tab variations

architecturalImprovements.before: Sticky positioning was on details element (top-level)
architecturalImprovements.after: Sticky positioning moved to inner wrapper (tabs-item-inner), details handles background/border
architecturalImprovements.benefit: Cleaner separation - details for styling, inner wrapper for positioning
